yolo.notes: Provide a YOLO model trained for logos, stamps, signatures, QR regions, and edited regions.

detectron2.notes: Recommended for layout parsing and instance segmentation of document objects.

segmentAnything.notes: Use to isolate suspicious edited regions and overlays.

clip.notes: Use for issuer/logo semantic matching and layout similarity.

paddleocr.notes: Install PaddleOCR runtime and models for multilingual OCR.

easyocr.notes: Use as a secondary OCR engine to measure agreement.

tesseract.notes: Requires local Tesseract binary on PATH.
